title: The Hunchback Horse
director: Aleksandra Snezhko-Blotskaya, Viktor Gromov, Ivan Ivanov-Vano
writer: Pyotr Ershov, Evgeniy Pomeshchikov, Nikolai Rozhkov
actors: Georgi Chernovolenko, Alik Kachanov, Anatoliy Kubatskiy
plot: Adventures of Ivan the Fool and humpbacked horse in the world of kind magical creatures and cruel people.
